subject.name: 10 Lower Spadina Condos
notes: Recommendation folded in from the former Subject & Conclusion sheet (now deleted). Source bridge: raw comp $/SF -> + subject premium (derived, PREMIUM BASIS) -> recommended $/SF; all-comp basis = conservative floor. Subject = pre-construction; mix estimated pending the developer suite schedule.

parking_adj.note: area parking comps: with-vs-without-parking rent delta ~$2.30/spot/mo across CityPlace/Waterfront leased pairs (condos.ca, 2026-06-17)

apt_premium.note: Unused — no apartment comps in selected set. If added, derive C3 from condo/apartment $/SF spread or a named market study; never a bare %.

subject_mix_manual.source: estimated — typical downtown waterfront condo program; no subject plans published (pre-construction). 2026-06-16.

other_excluded_prose:
User selected all 9 shortlisted buildings (2026-06-16) — no shortlisted-but-rejected comps pulled.
Evaluated & excluded (different micro-market / farther): Sugar Wharf, Lighthouse & Aquabella/Aqualuna, Bisha / King Blue / Theatre Park. Older CityPlace redundant with floor: Optima, Apex, Montage, Neo, Luna, Parade, West One, Harbour View I/III.

condo_rows.desc: Leased comp (Spectra, 85 Queens Wharf Rd). Interior SF from vipcondos published Spectra floor-plan dictionary, matched by stack (last 2 digits → suite plan; Route A PLATE-VERIFIED) and cross-checked to the MLS size bracket + bed count. Lease data (rent/date/MLS/exposure/parking) from condos.ca this session 2026-06-17. condos.ca has no per-unit registered area for this corp.

floor_plans.building: NOTE — one row per distinct VIPcondos plan opened this session. Quartz/Spectra SF was recovered via the Spectra plan dictionary (Route A); the other 8 comp buildings used condos.ca registered areas (Route B), so no VIPcondos plans were opened for them. Subject plans tagged '(SUBJECT)' when published.
